translations: And not any moving creature in
Allah (is) its provision And He knows
its dwelling place and its place of storage All
puzzle.hint: This verse affirms that the sustenance of every creature is guaranteed by the Creator.
puzzle.arabic: ۞ وَمَا مِن دَآبَّةٍۢ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ رِزْقُهَا وَيَعْلَمُ مُسْتَقَرَّهَا وَمُسْتَوْدَعَهَا ۚ كُلٌّۭ فِى كِتَـٰبٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
puzzle.verseEn: And there is no creature on earth but that upon Allāh is its provision, and He knows its place of dwelling and place of storage. All is in a clear register.
